User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account settings, subscription status, and generation usage statistics.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

usageCount.description: Number of script generations utilized in the current billing month.

lastUsageReset.description: Year-month string (e.g. '2026-07') of the last usage count reset.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

SavedScript.title: Saved Script
SavedScript.description: A YouTube script or title generation saved to the user's history.

id.description: Unique identifier of the script document.

userId.description: ID of the user who owns the script.

title.description: The generated title or primary hook.

script.description: The complete generated script or alternative titles content.

type.description: The type of content generated ('script' or 'title').

NewsletterSignup.title: Newsletter Signup
NewsletterSignup.description: Captures emails of visitors subscribing to the product newsletter.

users/{userId}.description: User profiles with billing and usage details.

savedScripts/{scriptId}.description: Generated scripts and titles linked to user accounts.
